data.body: Completion evidence — caused_by is fully implemented and tested; the test lives at tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_caused_by_relation.py (interface tier chosen over the originally-planned tests/unit/graph/ path — same round-trip coverage). (1) Relation Literal membership: src/rebar/types.py Relation.__args__ has 7 values including 'caused_by' (verified: python -c 'import rebar.types as t; print(t.Relation.__args__)'), GENERATED from src/rebar/schemas/common.schema.json $defs.relation.enum (7 values incl caused_by) and enforced by the CI gen_types --check drift gate (a stale types.py fails CI). (2) Round-trip: test_caused_by_relation.py::test_caused_by_link_round_trips. (3) Directional/non-cycle/legacy contracts + all 6 legacy relations parametrized: test_caused_by_relation_heldout.py (non-cycle mutation-tested against graph/_graph.py:204). (4) Whole change is green in CI (#813 LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1).
